title: noronhia mildbraedii
intro: Noronhia mildbraedii, a species of flowering plant in the family Scophulariaceae, is commonly known as the Madagascar perimetre plant. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Noronhia mildbraedii include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
